notes: Ostraka world calendar. Year = 360 days. TWO full seasonal cycles per year driven by Cruorbus's 6-month orbital wobble. Shadow Week (7 days) is an intercalary period at year-end, not counted in months.

months.name: Dawnspire
months.notes: First Spring. Wound visible on upper-left of Cruorbus. Magic is accessible but unstable.

months.name: Greenbloom
months.notes: Final Spring month. Chaos pressure begins building.

months.name: Goldensun
months.notes: DANGER MONTH. Cruorbus faces world wound-first. Maximum chaos exposure. Tides erratic. Mutations accelerate.

months.name: Highfever
months.notes: Peak of chaos surge. Dead things twitch. Grey Wardens on high alert.

months.name: Sunsear
months.notes: Wound rotates to right edge. Chaos pressure alleviates. Relief month.

months.name: Harvestride
months.notes: The Eye is closed. Wound faces away. World breathes. Purple halo corona visible.

months.name: Embershake
months.notes: Mild season. Harvest time. Low chaos. Trade flourishes.

months.name: Leafsfall
months.notes: Final Autumn. Cycle A ends. Vertical drift begins shifting wound downward.

months.name: Frostveil
months.notes: First Winter. Wound drifts to lower hemisphere. Cold and chaos both rise.

months.name: Deepbite
months.notes: DANGER MONTH. Wound faces world again from lower hemisphere. Winter chaos surge. Worst month of the year.

months.name: Ironwind
months.notes: Final month before Shadow Week. Chaos recedes. Factions prepare for the eclipse.

intercalary_periods.name: Shadow Week
intercalary_periods.description: 7-day total eclipse of the Broken Moon Cruorbus. World in complete darkness. The Avian Empire's Fulcrum Bank mints Aetherium Coin exclusively during this period. Shadow-Set Contracts are ratified. Chaos energy is cosmically re-anchored. Chaotic tides peak at coastlines. Every faction has unique rituals for survival.

Summer.notes: Open Eye phase. Chaos surges. Warden alert level elevated.

Autumn.notes: Halo phase. Calmest season. Best for trade and building.

Winter.notes: Wound on lower hemisphere. Cold + chaos both rise. Deepbite month is peak danger.

moons.name: Cruorbus
moons.description: The shattered primary moon. Source of Dragonstone meteor showers. Its orbital wobble drives the seasonal cycle. The wound (damage site) rotating face-on to Ostraka triggers chaos surges. Tidally locked but wobbles (libration).

phases.name: The Leering
phases.description: Wound on upper-left. Waxing phase. Magic unstable.

phases.name: The Open Eye
phases.description: Wound faces world directly. Maximum chaos. Red/Crimson color.

phases.name: The Halo
phases.description: Wound faces away. Purple corona. Calmest magic period.

moons.name: Erranith
moons.description: The secondary moon with an erratic orbit. When Erranith passes close to Cruorbus during the Surge State, it triggers intensified chaos events. The Clockwork Order tracks Erranith's orbit to predict the next Return event. Rule of Thumb: when the Wound hits the bottom of Cruorbus, the Ghost is coming.

special_alignments.name: The Nightmare Alignment
special_alignments.condition: Open Eye phase + Full Moon (sunlight fully hitting the wound)
special_alignments.effect: Peak chaos. Wound is fully lit and bleeding. Worst possible magic conditions. Chaos creature surge.

special_alignments.name: The Mercy Alignment
special_alignments.condition: Open Eye phase + New Moon (wound shadowed)
special_alignments.effect: Chaos dampened by shadow. Only faint purple glow. Rare window of safety during Summer.

special_alignments.name: The Ghost's Return
special_alignments.condition: Erranith passes close during Open Eye
special_alignments.effect: Extreme chaos surge. Mutations accelerate violently. Dragonstone meteor shower triggered.
